title: Supreme Court case could change when mail-in ballots count
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is reviewing a Mississippi case that could change when mail-in ballots must arrive to be counted nationwide.

title: Ain't no friend of mine? Trump muses about fighting Elvis during Graceland tour
shortDescription: “He’s got so many, there’s very few I don’t like,” Trump said of Elvis’ songs, adding: “He did nothing bad.”

title: See the Trump 'I did that' stickers on gas pumps, a callback to Biden
shortDescription: During record-high gas prices under Biden, stickers appeared on gas pumps with his picture saying 'I did that.' Now they have Trump's face on them.

title: With airports in chaos, Trump bats down potential DHS deal over SAVE
shortDescription: President Trump told Senate Majority Leader John Thune he wouldn't support an idea floated by aides to end the DHS shutdown and fund ICE later.

title: Supreme Court looks poised to limit mail-in ballots, a possible win for Trump
shortDescription: The Supreme Court's conservative majority seemed skeptical of late-arriving ballots. The case could lead to stricter rules in this year's midterm elections.

title: What does 'Trump TACO' mean? Iran ultimatum postponed before deadline
shortDescription: Tariff threats led to a viral acronym. Critics are now using it in conjunction with Iran power plants, Straight of Hormuz. What does Trump TACO mean?

title: Trump defends ICE in airports
shortDescription: President Trump blamed Democrats for the ongoing partial government shutdown and defended his choice to put ICE in airports.

title: Trump says Iran talks could secure peace
shortDescription: President Donald Trump claims a potential Iran deal would secure long-term peace and end nuclear ambitions.

title: Trump issues new deadline for Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: President Trump postponed military strikes against Iran for five days after 'productive' talks, delaying his Monday deadline.

title: Trump says talks could end war. Iran denies negotiations. Live updates
shortDescription: President Trump said U.S. is engaged in 'very strong talks' with Iran, which Iranian officials have denied.

title: 'Disgusting': Democratic senator slams Trump's reaction to Mueller's death
shortDescription: Sen. Chris Murphy called President Donald Trump's response to the death of Robert Mueller "disgusting."

title: Trump threatens Iranian energy infrastructure
shortDescription: President Donald Trump threatened to destroy Iranian power plants if the pivotal Strait of Hormuz isn't opened.

title: Trump to send ICE agents to help strained TSA at airports
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he is sending federal immigration agents to assist with the airport security delays impacting spring break travel.

title: Will Trump's face appear on a coin? What we know about 2 Trump coins.
shortDescription: The coins, if they are produced, would be the latest push by Trump and his allies to feature his name and likeness on items of national significance.

title: 'Lawless': Why this lawmaker wants Trump's attorney general impeached
shortDescription: From the Epstein files to the integrity of prosecutions, Democratic Congresswoman Summer Lee says Attorney General Pam Bondi is damaging the DOJ.

title: Trump push on mail-in ballots hits Supreme Court. What it means for the midterms
shortDescription: A Republican push to limit mail-in ballots in elections is hitting the Supreme Court, and the case could have big implications for the upcoming midterms races.

title: Five things to know about former FBI chief and Trump foe Robert Mueller
shortDescription: The former Marine overhauled - and, supporters say, helped save - the FBI after the 9/11 attacks. Then he took on Trump in the probe of a lifetime.

title: Who is Robert Mueller? Former FBI director, Trump foe dies at 81.
shortDescription: Here's what to know about Robert Mueller, the former FBI director and Trump foe who died on Saturday, March 21, at the age of 81.

title: Trump responds to Robert Mueller's death. 'I'm glad.'
shortDescription: Amid sober tributes to the former FBI director, President Trump wrote: "I’m glad he’s dead. He can no longer hurt innocent people!"
